reviews.review_description: Why why just why this game is low quality the bosses in this game SUCKS
💖I love your game so much my dear friends. 💖So much fun and calorie burning at the same time.💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖💖

developer_response.body:
Thank you Rosanna!

It was cool to hear that a great adventurer like you enjoy Kuriver 💖


We'll bring a lot of cool content to the full version, you're more than welcome to join our Discord to stay tuned: 
https://discord.gg/nYgS7EnhYP
